ask_ai_prompt: EBITDA-gaygu waa {ebitda} (heerka faa'iidada {margin}%), EBITDA la hagaajiyay: {adjusted}, SDE: {sde}. Dakhli: {revenue}. Warshadaha: {industry}. Dhibcaha tayada: {quality}%. Marka {multiple}x, qiimayntu waa {valuation}. Falanqee caafimaadka EBITDA-gayga oo soo jeedi hagaajin.
breakdown_hint: Guji qiime kasta si aad wax uga beddesho
breakdown_note_suffix: waa si toos ah loo qiyaasay. Guji si aad u beddesho. Midig-guji si aad dib ugu celiso.
editable_auto_tooltip: Toos: {value} · Guji si aad wax uga beddesho · Midig-guji si aad dib ugu celiso
editable_tooltip: Guji si aad wax uga beddesho
accepted_addbacks_heading: Dib-u-darid la aqbalay (maalgeliyeyaashu way aqbali doonaan kuwan)
rejected_addbacks_heading: Sida caadiga ah la diido (iibsadayaashu way ka doodi doonaan kuwan)
rejected_warning: Digniin: {n} dib-u-darid la diiday. Iibsadayaashu waxay u badan tahay inay ka doodaan intii lagu jiro baadhitaanka.
sde_intro: SDE = EBITDA la hagaajiyay + Wadarta Mushaharka Milkiilaha. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa ganacsiyada qiimahoodu ka yar yahay ~{sym}5M oo milkiiluhu ay firfircoon yahay. Iibsadayaashu way ku beddelaan oo dib ku daraan mushaharkaaga oo dhan.
sde_note: Ku dar mushaharkaaga oo dhan, faa'iidooyinka, kharashyada shakhsi ee ganacsiga marka, wax-ku-biirinta hawlgabka, iyo faa'iido kasta.
above_industry_range: Ka sarreeya xadka warshadaha — waxay u baahan tahay tayo xoog leh
quality_intro: Qiimee arrin kasta 0–3 si aad u aragto meesha ganacsigaagu ku dhex jiro xadka isku-dhufashada warshadaha. Dhibcaha sare waxay isku-dhufashadaada u riixaan xagga sare ee xadka {low}x–{high}x.
scenario_intro: Jiid seddada si aad u aragto sida isbeddellada {label} ay u saameeyaan qiimaynta ganacsigaaga.
summary_section_title: Kooban oo Diyaar u ah Maalgeliyaha
disclaimer_body: Kani waa qiyaas muujinaya oo ku saleysan halbeegyada warshadaha iyo xog is-sheegtay. Ma aha qiimayn ganacsi rasmi ah. La tasho khabiir qiimayn oo u qalma go'aannada maalgelinta, iibka, ama maalgelinta.
ab_owner_comp_desc: Mushaharkaaga ka sarreeya qiimaha suuqa ee lagu beddeli lahaa
ab_owner_perks_desc: Baabuur shakhsi, taleefan, safar oo ganacsiga lagu qoray
ab_family_wages: Mushahar Qoys oo Suuqa ka Sarreeya
ab_family_wages_desc: Xubnaha qoyska oo lagu bixiyay qiime suuqa ka sarreeya
ab_onetime_fees_desc: Kharashyada sharci, la-talin, hubin oo aan soo noqnoqon
ab_rent_adjust: Kiro Xiriir leh oo Suuqa ka Sarreeya
ab_rent_adjust_desc: Kiro naftaada aad siisay oo suuqa ka sarreeya
ab_litigation_desc: Heshiisyo sharci oo hal-mar ah ama xukummo
ab_writedowns_desc: Kayd ama hanti hal-mar ah oo qiimo lumay
ab_discontinued_desc: Kharashyo ka yimid xariiq badeeco oo aad xidhay
ab_accel_deprec_desc: Qiimo-dhaca canshuurta oo ka badan duugoobista dhabta ah
ab_recurring_capex_desc: Kharash raasumaal oo joogto ah — iibsadayaashu way diidaan kan
ab_marketing_desc: Kharash suuq-geyn oo joogto ah — iibsadayaashu way diidaan kan
ab_commissions_desc: Kharashyo iib oo joogto ah — iibsadayaashu way diidaan kan
ab_bonuses_desc: Qaab abaalmarin joogto ah — iibsadayaashu way diidaan kan
qf_owner_indep_desc: Ganacsigu wuu shaqeeyaa adiga la'aantaa maalin-kasta
qf_growth_desc: Waxay u koraysaa si ka dhaqso badan celceliska warshadaada
qf_barriers_desc: Teknoolaji gaar ah, shatiyo, sumcad astaan leh
